title: COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER - 211info
text: CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF THE MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY AND CENTRAL COAST COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers outpatient mental health services including parent child interaction therapy, and youth and family counseling. 3737 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Individuals and families with minor children who are enrolled in OHP Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 390-2600 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 390-2600 Main phone (855) 895-7189 FAX Main phone (503) 390-2600 Dawnna Garrison [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of Portland Road and Bill Frey Drive. Located on Portland Road, south of I-5. Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Parent Child Interactive Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - FATHER TAAFFE HOMES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FOSTERING HOPE INITIATIVE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
